scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run dev --workspace server & npm run dev --workspace client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
scripts.test: vitest run -c vitest.shared.config.ts && vitest run -c vitest.server.config.ts && vitest run -c vitest.client.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run -c vitest.shared.config.ts --coverage && vitest run -c vitest.server.config.ts --coverage && vitest run -c vitest.client.config.ts --coverage
